name: game-mod-translator
description: Translate game mod UI text into any language without decompiling DLLs. Works with Unity/BepInEx, Unreal, and other mod frameworks. Extracts strings from binaries, discovers translation infrastructure, generates safe translation files.
descriptionZh: 在不反编译 DLL 的前提下将游戏模组 UI 文本翻译成任意语言。支持 Unity/BepInEx、Unreal 等模组框架。从二进制中提取字符串、发现翻译基础设施、生成安全的翻译文件。
author: xinshao
